recalls.Description: Nutraceutical is recalling Heritage Store Hydrogen Peroxide Mouthwash available in Wintermint and Eucalyptus Mint flavors. These products come in dark opaque brown bottles with white lids, featuring a pink and white label that showcases the Heritage Store logo along with the product name and flavor. All production lots are affected by this recall.
recalls.Title: Heritage Store Hydrogen Peroxide Mouthwash Recall Due to Poisoning Risk and Child Safety Violations
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers can reach Nutraceutical at 800-227-6063 from 7 a.m. to 5 p.m. MT, Monday through Friday, or via email at info@nutracorp.com. More information can be found online at https://heritagestore.com/pages/recall, www.betterbeing.com/recall, or www.Nutraceutical.com by clicking on 'Product Recall' at the bottom right of the page.

Images.Caption: Recalled Heritage Store Hydrogen Peroxide Mouthwash - Wintermint
Recalled Heritage Store Hydrogen Peroxide Mouthwash - Eucalyptus Mint

Manufacturers.Name: Nutraceutical Corporation, of Salt Lake City, Utah

Retailers.Name: Available at Whole Foods, Fresh Thyme Farmers Market, Mom's Organic Market, New Season's Market, Mother's Market & Kitchen, and various other retailers both in-store and online including Amazon, iHerb, and HeritageStore.com from October 2010 through December 2023, priced around $10.50.

Hazards.Name: The mouthwash contains ethanol at a concentration that requires child-resistant packaging under the Poison Prevention Packaging Act (PPPA). The current packaging does not meet this requirement, increasing the risk of poisoning if ingested by young children.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately keep the mouthwash out of children's reach and contact Nutraceutical Corporation for a full refund or a replacement product at no cost, including shipping, based on availability. Consumers will be instructed to dispose of the product. Nutraceutical will reach out to all known buyers directly.

recalls.metaDescription: Recall of Heritage Store Hydrogen Peroxide Mouthwash due to poisoning risk. Contact Nutraceutical for refunds or replacements.
